◎简　　介  

　　Global, a Canadian TV network, announced that its hit series Rookie Blue will premiere on Thursday, June 16 at 10 PM. Obviously, the series will also be aired on ABC, an American TV network.The first seasons follows five rookies from a police department (Missy Peregrym, Gregory Smith, Charlotte Sullivan, Travis Milne and Enuka Okuma).
